project.name: Lumera JS/TS SDK
project.description: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Lumera — unified client for blockchain (CosmJS+REST) and Cascade storage (sn-api) with LEP-1 support

primary: Provide unified client for Lumera blockchain and Cascade storage operations
Expose Blockchain client surface: Blockchain.Action.*, Blockchain.Supernode.*, Tx.*
Minimize boilerplate for web and Node apps (wallet-friendly)
secondary: Examples and docs for browser and Node
Testnet/Mainnet presets and easy migration from direct API usage
Adapter seam to add gRPC-web later without breaking apps

architecture.design_pattern: Unified client with modular sub-clients and pluggable adapters

layers.name: Client Layer
layers.responsibility: Entry point, configuration, composition of sub-clients

layers.name: Blockchain Layer
layers.notes: Transactions via CosmJS (simulate/sign/broadcast). Module queries via REST/LCD. gRPC-web is a future optional adapter.

layers.name: Storage Layer
layers.notes: Direct REST/SSE integration with sn-api; no SuperNode SDK wrapper.

layers.name: WASM Layer
layers.responsibility: RaptorQ and data helpers via rq-wasm
layers.notes: rq-wasm is used for layout generation and related data ops; key signing is done by wallets (ADR-036) or CosmJS signers.

blockchain_sdk.purpose: Cosmos SDK tx simulate/sign/broadcast; wallet integration; encoding
blockchain_sdk.notes: Primary transport for transactions (Tendermint RPC via CosmJS).

http_client.purpose: HTTP client for REST/LCD and sn-api
http_client.notes: Use global fetch in browsers; undici/polyfill for Node.

validation.purpose: Runtime validation of REST/LCD & sn-api payloads
validation.notes: Generate static types + validate critical boundaries.

crypto_hash.purpose: File hashing for data_hash and start/download signatures

grpc_web.purpose: Future gRPC-web adapter for queries (if needed)
grpc_web.notes: Not required for initial release; keep interface seam.

openapi_typescript.notes: Keep in sync with sn-api releases.

queries: Get action params (fee schedule, rq_ids_max) via LCD
Get action by ID via LCD
blockchain_operations.notes: No direct gRPC required; LCD for module queries, CosmJS for tx. Add gRPC-web adapter later if needed.

cascade: Upload via sn-api (multipart stream, start signature)
Download via sn-api (task request + file retrieval)
Task status via SSE (preferred) or polling
Public/private objects (empty vs signed download auth)
storage_operations.notes: sn-api is the off-chain orchestrator for symbol distribution and reconstruction.

lep1: Canonical Base64 + canonical JSON bytes for signatures
wasm_operations.notes: Signing is performed by wallet/in-app signer (ADR-036) over canonical bytes; rq-wasm not used for private-key ops.

api_design: Cascade client: buildMetadataFromFile, startCascade, requestDownload, watchTask

sn_api_integration.authentication: Signature-based (Base64(Sign(blake3(file))) for upload; Base64(Sign(actionId)) for private download)
sn_api_integration.notes: SSE strongly recommended for progress; polling fallback provided.

rq_wasm_integration.initialization: Lazy init with worker; Node uses WASM runtime via WasmBridge
operations: LEP-1 layout IDs derivation (N=50) with wrap(rq_ids_ic+i, rq_ids_max)
rq_wasm_integration.notes: Exact bytes and Base64 (RFC 4648, no wrap) must be preserved across platforms.

blockchain_proto_integration.approach: CosmJS for tx path; REST/LCD for module queries
alternatives: Optional future: Buf/Connect gRPC-web adapter implementing the same BlockchainClient interface

testing.integration_tests: Mocked LCD/sn-api + golden vectors for LEP-1 bytes/signatures

documentation.migration_guide: From direct REST/grpc usage to sdk-js

code_quality.error_handling: Context-rich errors (HTTP status, endpoint, retryable flag)

performance.concurrency: Configurable concurrency for chunked uploads (if/when added)

versioning_strategy.stability_target: v1.0.0 when BlockchainClient and Cascade interfaces stabilize
versioning_strategy.deprecation_policy: Support deprecated APIs for one major version

pre_release: Docs complete (Quick Start, API, LEP-1 guide)

planned_features: Optional gRPC-web adapter (Buf/Connect) for module queries

determinism: Canonical JSON when producing bytes for signatures (stable key order)
Base64 RFC 4648 (no wrap, no padding trimming)
Sign exact serialized bytes referenced on chain
security: Use ADR-036 signArbitrary for off-chain signatures
Replay protection via domain separation where applicable
usability: Clear error messages with actionable guidance
maintainability: Clear separation between Blockchain (CosmJS+REST) and Cascade (sn-api)

browser_compatibility.notes: Use Web Workers for rq-wasm; Node uses WasmBridge
